title: Senior Content Writer
description:
**Job Title:** 
 Content Marketing Specialist
 



**Location:** 
 Pune, Maharashtra
 



**Experience:** 
 6\\+ Years
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full\\-Time
 



**Company Name:** 
 Opus Technologies
 



  





**About the Role:** 
 We are seeking a dynamic Content Writer to own and scale our end‑to‑end content strategy across LinkedIn, website, campaigns, and brand assets. This role sits at the intersection of brand, demand generation, and leadership storytelling—driving thought leadership, strengthening market positioning, and supporting GTM priorities. The Content Lead will work closely with marketing, C‑suite leaders, and subject\\-matter experts to craft compelling narratives that elevate the company’s voice, accelerate growth, and enhance executive visibility. This is a high\\-impact role for a seasoned B2B content professional who can balance strategic thinking with hands\\-on execution.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 LinkedIn \\& Thought Leadership
 


* Own the company’s LinkedIn presence and content strategy.
* Run a monthly content calendar covering POVs, thought leadership, case studies, culture, and people stories.
* Partner with leadership to strengthen executive visibility through consistent storytelling.



 Paid LinkedIn Campaigns
 


* Plan and execute paid campaigns, boosts, and sponsored ads.
* Collaborate with growth teams to promote key content, events, and reports.
* Track performance and optimize messaging and formats.



 Thought Leadership Program (Opus)
 


* Lead the end\\-to\\-end thought leadership engine.
* Manage SME‑driven and externally authored content.
* Maintain voice, narrative quality, and alignment with GTM and business priorities.



 Website Content \\& Copy
 


* Own website copy, structure, and ongoing content updates.
* Work with design, SEO, and leadership to ensure strong positioning and value articulation.
* Keep case studies, solution pages, and portfolio narratives current.



 Campaign Content Development
 


* Develop content for integrated campaigns, events, launches, and announcements.
* Ensure unified messaging across digital, social, website, paid media, and sales assets.



 Sales \\& Brand Enablement
 


* Support RFP content creation and refinement.
* Contribute to Analyst Relations submissions.
* Maintain brand assets—corporate decks, brochures, one‑pagers, case studies, and datasheets.



  





**Skills \\& Experience Required:** 



* 6\\+ years in B2B content marketing (tech/SaaS/fintech preferred).
* Strong understanding of LinkedIn as a brand and growth channel.
* Proven experience running structured thought leadership programs.
* Ability to collaborate with CxOs, SMEs, agencies, and writers.
* Exceptional storytelling and simplification of complex ideas.
* Experience balancing brand, demand\\-gen, and sales enablement content.
* Strong project management, editorial judgment, and stakeholder communication skills.



  





**Why Opus Technologies?** 




 Opus Technologies is shaping the future of Banking \\& Payments. With experience building highly innovative solutions and products, we combine our deep technology proficiency with unmatched domain expertise in Banking, Payments and Fintech, enabling us to deliver unparalleled quality and value in everything we do.

 It is not just a tech company \\- we are a digital transformation partner to some of the world’s leading financial institutions. Our teams specialize in building scalable, secure, and innovative solutions in issuing, acquiring, switching, digital wallets, and real\\-time payments. At Opus Technologies, we don’t just build software—we engineer solutions that transform industries. As a fast\\-growing digital transformation partner, Opus empowers global enterprises with cutting\\-edge technology across Cloud, Data, AI/ML, DevOps, and Product Engineering.

title: Automation QA Engineer – Data Quality and AI/ML
description:
**Company Description** 




 ProfoundIQ offers CTO\\-as\\-a\\-Service, providing senior technology leadership to organizations where technology is fundamental for growth, operations, and long\\-term success. Our expertise includes guiding sound technology decisions, aligning engineering efforts with business objectives, and building scalable systems to adapt to increasing complexity. Beyond consulting, we take ownership of strategic direction, execution, and results, embedding ourselves deeply as technology leaders. Our business\\-focused, outcome\\-driven approach reduces risks, enhances decision\\-making, and creates robust technology foundations to support sustained growth and transformation.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 This is a full\\-time remote role for an Automation QA Engineer – Data Quality and AI/ML with 4\\-7 years experience for one of our clients.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Validate determinism and reproducibility in systems where identical inputs yield varying outputs, identifying causes like non\\-deterministic algorithms or environmental factors.
* Assess gold datasets and AI\\-generated content for quality, scalability, and reliability before use in testing.
* Develop automation to detect duplicates and near\\-duplicates in large text datasets using techniques like hashing or embedding similarity.
* QA automated scoring/evaluation functions to ensure pass/fail accuracy, including edge case verification.
* Test tool/API contracts for correct formatting and prevent silent failures in agent\\-based systems.
* Write stable UI tests with tools like Playwright, focusing on robust selectors and waits; structure API tests using Postman/Newman or pytest/requests for maintainability.



  





**Required Skills and Experience** 



* Proven QA automation experience with Cypress or Selenium (mandatory as per request).
* Strong background in data quality testing for AI/ML systems, including dataset validation and evaluation metrics.
* Proficiency in Playwright for UI testing, API testing frameworks (Postman, pytest), and handling non\\-determinism in RL environments or similar.
